source_evidence: Eq. (8): d_hat_{p,q} = {x_q - x_p, y_q - y_p, z_q - z_p} / L_{p,q}. 'The directional cosines vector for the bar between nodes p and q.'
purpose: Computes the unit directional-cosines vector of a member, used to build the nodal equilibrium matrix B^T and to perform the collinearity check.
assumptions: Resulting vector has unit norm by definition
Straight member between the two nodes
formula_or_algorithm: d_hat_{p,q} = (1/L_{p,q}) * {x_q - x_p, y_q - y_p, z_q - z_p}, where L_{p,q} is the member length (Eq. 7).

reuse_risk.explanation: Standard normalized direction vector; only caveat is division by zero for coincident nodes.

missing_information: Guard against zero-length (coincident) nodes in code
